memoryArtifacts.headline: Alnwick Castle, held by Henry Percy, possible birthplace of his son "Harry Hotspur."
Alnwick Abbey, Northumberland, England. Photo added to Find a Grave by Creative Commons on 13 September 2012.
Alnwick Castle. Watercolor by J. M. W. Turner, circa 1829. Now at Art Gallery of South Australia.
Isometric view of Alnwick Castle, 1866. From Wikiwand.

popularStory.headline: Biographical Wikipedia Article
popularStory.description: Eustace de Vesci (1169–1216) was an English lord of Alnwick Castle, and a Magna Carta surety.[1] He also held lands in Sprouston, Roxburghshire, Scotland as brother in-law to King Alexander II of Scot …

sourceList.title: Eustace de Vescy, "Find A Grave Index"

events.name: The Red Book of the Exchequer records "Eustachius de Vescy" holding the barony of Alnwick with 12 knights’ fees in Northumberland

Suspected of treason against John King of England, he fled to Scotland, was outlawed in England and his property seized. After being invited back to England after King John submitted to the Pope, Eustace was restored.
Fact
events.place: Suspected of treason against King John of England, he fled to Scotland, and was outlawed in England, and all his property was confiscated

events.name: Alternate Death Date
events.date: 12 June 1216, shot through the head by an arrow
events.place: while besieging Barnard Castle, Durham, England

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eustace de Vescy於1169年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德阿恩維克時，他的父親William de Vesci44歲，母親Burga de Stuteville23歲。他於1208年與Princess Margaret Dunkeld of Scotland結婚。他於1195年登記服兵役。他去世於1216年8月在英國達勒姆巴納德 卡素享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾華頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eustace de Vescy于1169年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德阿恩維克时，他的父亲William de Vesci44岁，母亲Burga de Stuteville23岁。他于1208年与Princess Margaret Dunkeld of Scotland结婚。他于1195年登记服兵役。他去世于1216年8月在英国達勒姆巴納德 卡素享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾華頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vescy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian: from vesco ‘bishop’, a north-central variant of Vescovo .

variants.name: Vescovo
meanings: Italian: from vescovo ‘bishop’, a derivative of Greek episkopos ‘bishop’, literally ‘overseer’, applied as a status name denoting someone in the service of a bishop or alternatively a nickname for a pompous or pious person.

nameMeanings.name: Eustace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French form of the Late Greek names Eustakhios and Eustathios. These were evidently of separate origin, the former derived from eu ‘well, good’ + stakhys ‘grapes’, the latter from eu + stēnai ‘to stand’. However, the tradition is very confused. The name was introduced in this form to Britain by the Normans, among whom it was popular as a result of the fame of St Eustace , a Norman nobleman who was said to have been converted to Christianity by the vision of a crucifix between the antlers of the stag he was hunting.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Eustace de Vescy was born in 1169, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Vesci, was 44 and his mother, Burga de Stuteville, was 23. He married Princess Margaret Dunkeld of Scotland in 1208. He registered for military service in 1195. He died in August 1216, in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Watton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eustace de Vescy est né en 1169, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Vesci, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Burga de Stuteville, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Princess Margaret Dunkeld of Scotland en 1208. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1195. Il est décédé en août 1216, à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Watton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eustace de Vescy 1169 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Vesci 44 und seine Mutter Burga de Stuteville 23. Er hat 1208 Princess Margaret Dunkeld of Scotland geheiratet. Er hat sich 1195 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb im August 1216 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Barnard Castle, Durham, England und wurde in Watton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eustace de Vescy è nato il nel 1169 nel Alnwick, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Vesci, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Burga de Stuteville, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Princess Margaret Dunkeld of Scotland nel 1208. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1195. Morì nel agosto 1216, nel Barnard Castle, Durham, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Watton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustace de Vescyが1169年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで生まれた時，父William de Vesciは44歳，母Burga de Stutevilleは23歳であった。1208年にPrincess Margaret Dunkeld of Scotlandと結婚した。彼は1195年に兵役登録をした。彼は1216年8月にイギリスダルハムバーナルド カストルで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustace de Vescy(이)가 1169년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Vesci(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Burga de Stuteville(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1208년 Princess Margaret Dunkeld of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1195년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1216년 8월 영국 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 왓튼에 묻혔다.

mn.Watton Priory, Yorkshire, England: Watton, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eustace de Vescy nasceu em 1169, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Vesci, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Burga de Stuteville, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Princess Margaret Dunkeld of Scotland em 1208. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1195. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1216, em Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Watton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eustace de Vescy родился в 1169 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Vesci было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Burga de Stuteville, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Princess Margaret Dunkeld of Scotland в 1208 г. В 1195 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер август 1216 г. в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности ваттон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eustace de Vescy nació en 1169, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Vesci, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Burga de Stuteville, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Princess Margaret Dunkeld of Scotland en 1208. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1195. Murió en agosto de 1216, en Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Watton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
